name: Binary Creation in System Folder Detected
description: Detects the creation of executable (EXE) or library (DLL) files within the Windows system directory by a system process. This is highly unusual and could indicate malware installation or exploitation.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the file creation event.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that created the file, which should be 'System'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process creating the file.

parameters.name: target_filename
parameters.description: The full path and name of the created executable or DLL file within C:\Windows\.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user context under which the file was created (typically SYSTEM).

parameters.name: hashes
parameters.description: The cryptographic hashes (e.g., MD5, SHA1, SHA256) of the created file.
